title: bistorta macrophylla var. stenophylla
intro: Bistorta macrophylla var. stenophylla, also known as Alchemilla xanthochlora or more commonly, the large-leaved bistort, is a perennial plant with large, rounded leaves and small, white or yellowish flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bistorta macrophylla var. stenophylla include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-viral activities. Bistorta macrophylla var. stenophylla can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional folk medicines.
